content: *경이 물품, 희귀 (조율 필요)* --- 이 투구는 3회의 충전을 가지고 있습니다. 투구를 착용한 상태에서 1회 충전을 소모하여 [순간이동](/1def7f5a1e8081869d19e65b04a137f5?pvs=25) 주문을 시전할 수 있습니다. 매일 새벽에 투구는 소모된 충전량 중 1d3만큼을 회복합니다. --- ![](https://prod-files-secure.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/8dffc202-0f6e-4adf-b208-fc378f0d8bf3/db41c4c2-fa86-485b-bb97-62fb80b88d67/636284739707897018.jpeg?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Content-Sha256=UNSIGNED-PAYLOAD&X-Amz-Credential=ASIAZI2LB466ZIJSNAIW%2F20260616%2Fus-west-2%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Date=20260616T092841Z&X-Amz-Expires=3600&X-Amz-Security-Token=IQoJb3JpZ2luX2VjEKf%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2FwEaCXVzLXdlc3QtMiJHMEUCIQCUi1mhb7bAKBUmFdTjHPmAIU2%2FzEntU72U23L06NgS4wIgERYq5vlnmgqpV%2FnFlMb8c6aC%2B8KIIpbcBJwviHjkJrgq%2FwMIbxAAGgw2Mzc0MjMxODM4MDUiDPc8ipk4RK%2BBgaToGSrcA%2BCl6BlSL78rHxRq6gFLXxeEike3L0zgiHG9KwU5mljvjhdz%2B0WGfBgKL6DtTcJ6OAr6xyxY5SNt%2BkaFphncBVFZJ9nEQOCvVKMHysSsl8rKYiQVOzfN%2F%2Fp6Uqgc6uAE0EUmnq5J4kIBe2LnoaxAGmquncWEB60h1huzCpDnyiAOg%2B%2Fjq4cutiDNv0c1DGDDoop6paDiPMr0VdqPSgHeB%2FRbjt36wjXk55v9uPzh1xCXb4kvW39u6kSbMlZPfQfPtFTeR9MXZm1wtTvJY11Op48Kkk7essiNWHPkh%2BNO8hDrOP%2BI3H4OdjaUcPyNohx8iDndV12a7bK09wLhXcVh3Z%2FLdos09fgVnJDgxUZlS%2F7KH1uVU%2Fqy00o0yNJkOzHMiJ3ekXZ9xW57Ygdh0BdYKzY8QUHHugyeBXt3pHMga%2BoR%2FfQfy4GQD9chEYtV5V90p1qufh2FIUNUZTTbnGc5qd8DqZj736oeDbcL4XBQt6VZT30OyQMsUcZTHGVlt84IjZy7%2FtR32YY2%2B6tpVGUDFOIPcLMNGaO%2FoE%2FtnXd6JC6L%2BRCgjQ1XJojoW7v5elT%2B%2Fhip%2BCs7%2F4xpGXRakIsOb1n2ZWobpmM2q9w7SBw6WKZBd%2BevR9UIIXwV%2FNYEMJbbw9EGOqUB2Aq5Rh2V4k5BiyaXLa8rp7RMJNCbLLA%2FiSZ6FoDyrv6S1ossf2MWHaFkUjSjOgbICwVlLDai5wNxH9fqmA2rGKcBaQn1C%2BP0Sl3R9VKKSaLjHMf46baMn3tjrUwlyZ38fG%2BD8k06I8GcVIwTk%2Bfmvx3s8%2F29RbUUMqi0VEMRLEaAWmeK%2F62RnU2k%2BXmGh82pC%2FhToIUE3PiFw2TAEMwQ1%2BbrIMvo&X-Amz-Signature=c1d3334a8e048bce4a7647b4b2fd45c89408177fbef3cc5ae21e55df5f7bcff9&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host&x-amz-checksum-mode=ENABLED&x-id=GetObject)
